children.text: to complement the assistance for Poland authorized by sections 5413(b), 5421, and 5423 of this title, and
to support the activities of the joint commission established pursuant to section 2226 of the American Aid to Poland Act of 1988 ( note),7 U.S.C. 1431

children.heading: Emphasis on agricultural development
children.label: b Emphasis on agricultural development
children.text: The uses of local currencies generated under this section should emphasize the development of agricultural infrastructure, agriculture-related training, and other aspects of agricultural development in Poland.

children.heading: Commodities subject to requirements
children.label: c Commodities subject to requirements
children.text: Subsection (a) applies with respect to agricultural commodities made available for Poland for fiscal years 1990, 1991, and 1992 under , the Food for Peace Act ( and following), and section 1736 of title 7.section 1431(b) of title 77 U.S.C. 1691o

children.heading: Other uses not precluded
children.label: d Other uses not precluded
children.text: The uses of agricultural commodities and local currencies specified in subsection (a) are in addition to other uses authorized by law.
